entries.title: Dumbledore collects Harry and recruits Slughorn

entries.title: Altered Horcrux memory and Harry’s task

context.label: Altered Horcrux memory task before Apparition lessons

content.fact: Dumbledore shows Harry the altered Slughorn memory and assigns him to obtain the true memory; this gives Harry a dangerous clue, not full trio knowledge.
content.injection: In this window, Harry is pursuing Slughorn’s true memory. Hermione and Ron may know Harry has a task only if told, but they should not fluently explain Horcruxes or Voldemort’s split-soul plan before the true memory.
content.notes: Original paraphrased date anchor derived from Harry Potter Lexicon calendar/timeline pages; source wording is not reproduced.
constraints: Use this card to suppress premature Hermione Horcrux expertise.
